deployment_question: How does the model perform at a hospital, scanner, center, or institution absent from training?
definition: Hold out all samples from one or more sites and evaluate external performance on those sites. This targets institutional transportability and site-specific acquisition shift.

split_operator.spectra_mapping: same-site train overlap is zero for the held-out site

implementation_recipe: Assign all samples from held-out sites to external test.
Train and tune without using held-out site labels.
Report calibration and discrimination for each site separately.
quality_gates: Document whether site labels also encode scanner, clinician, geography, or population.
Report site-level sample sizes and outcome prevalence.
failure_modes: A site split may confound acquisition protocol with patient mix.
Pooling external sites can hide a failing deployment site.

citations.title: Evaluating the Portability of SepsisWatch
citations.evidence: Performs multi-site external validation of a sepsis machine-learning model.

citations.title: Confounding variables can degrade generalization performance of radiological deep learning models
citations.evidence: Shows pneumonia models perform worse across hospitals and can exploit hospital-specific confounders.
